title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le bilan médical
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Isn't the company health check scheduled for next Thursday? (A) Actually, it was moved to Friday. (B) I'll see the doctor next month. (C) Yes, the clinic is downtown.

choices: Actually, it was moved to Friday.
I'll see the doctor next month.
questions.explanation: Question de confirmation ("Isn't it..."). (A) corrige l'information avec la bonne date. (B) parle d'un rendez-vous personnel, (C) répond à une question de lieu.
